purpose: Burn-scar evidence source audit for FP-catalog re-analysis pass. Per the use-all-data directive, enumerate every burn-scar-relevant collection on Planetary Computer + DGX BEFORE computing, list which will be used and why; skipping requires a documented reason.

candidates.label: USE
candidates.title: Sentinel-2 Level-2A
candidates.why_relevant: 10m optical NBR via B8A/B12; gold standard burn-scar

candidates.label: USE
candidates.title: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2
candidates.why_relevant: 30m optical NBR via nir08/swir22; fills S2 revisit gap

candidates.label: USE
candidates.title: Sentinel 1 Radiometrically Terrain Corrected (RTC)
candidates.why_relevant: C-band SAR; cloud-immune backscatter delta; Mediterranean grass/scrub burn = ΔVV ~ -1 to -3 dB

candidates.label: USE
candidates.title: MODIS Surface Reflectance 8-Day (500m)
candidates.why_relevant: MOD09A1 8-day SR 500m; NBR via b2/b7; daily revisit fills gaps

candidates.label: USE
candidates.title: MODIS Thermal Anomalies/Fire Daily
candidates.why_relevant: MOD14A1 daily 1km active fire; thermal-history corroboration

candidates.label: PROBE
candidates.error: get_collection failed: {"code":"NotFoundError","description":"No collection with id 'sentinel-3-olci-lfr-l2-land' found!"}
candidates.why_relevant: 300m OLCI land L2 products; burn-scar lower-priority

candidates.label: PROBE
candidates.error: get_collection failed: {"code":"NotFoundError","description":"No collection with id 'viirs-09a1-001' found!"}
candidates.why_relevant: VIIRS surface reflectance; alternate NBR source

candidates.label: PROBE
candidates.title: MODIS Surface Reflectance 8-Day (250m)
candidates.why_relevant: MOD09Q1 8-day SR 250m; finer than 09A1 but only 2 bands

candidates.label: PROBE
candidates.title: Sentinel 1 Level-1 Ground Range Detected (GRD)
candidates.why_relevant: GRD backscatter; raw VV/VH; alternative if RTC unavailable

dgx_mtg_fci_check.reason: DGX SSH timed out at 12s connect (paramiko TimeoutError) at audit time. Per task spec, if DGX access exceeds the per-cell budget the source is skipped with a documented reason. Re-enable in next pass when Tailscale/DGX link is stable.

used.role: secondary optical NBR @ 30m (nir08/swir22); covers S2 revisit gaps
cloud-immune SAR backscatter change (VV+VH dB delta)
8-day 500m SR NBR (b02/b07) — coarse fill across long windows
daily 1km active-fire mask + MaxFRP — thermal-history corroboration
internal+external_fires temporal persistence (FIRMS, VIIRS, MODIS, MTG-AF, SLSTR proxy, VVF, S1-SAR, TROPOMI)

skipped.reason: Collection not found on PC (NotFoundError). No public OLCI burn-scar collection exposed under this id.
Collection not found on PC under this id. MODIS-09A1 already covers coarse optical NBR.
Redundant with 14A1 (daily strictly finer than 8-day for thermal history). Held in reserve.
Only 2 SR bands (b01/b02) — no SWIR for NBR. 09A1 provides full band stack.
DGX SSH timed out at audit; per task budget, skip and document. Not silenced.
